g.text: H3 (User control & freedom) and H9 (Error recognition & recovery) show catastrophic (4) severity in MedRec and BurstIQ, rooted in blockchain immutability and

text.style: font-size: 8.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #4a515a

g.text: the lack of reversible actions. No application meets the compliance threshold (≤ 0.5).
